_comment: Palworld via Wine + UE4SS mod support | Based on pelican-eggs/palworld, adapted for gOOvER wine image
name: Palworld (Wine + UE4SS)
author: admin@example.com
description: Palworld dedicated server running via Wine (Windows binaries) with UE4SS mod loader support. Uses gOOvER's Wine image.
startup: export WINEDLLOVERRIDES="dwmapi=n,b" && export WINEPREFIX=/home/container/.wine && export DISPLAY=:0 && wine64 /home/container/PalServer.exe Pal -publiclobby -useperfthreads -NoAsyncLoadingThread -UseMultithreadForDS -port={{SERVER_PORT}} -publicport={{SERVER_PORT}} -servername="{{SERVER_NAME}}" -players={{MAX_PLAYERS}} $([ -n "$SERVER_PASSWORD" ] && echo "-serverpassword=\"${SERVER_PASSWORD}\"") -adminpassword="{{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}" -rcon -rconport={{RCON_PORT}} -allowconnectplatform={{ALLOW_CONNECT_PLATFORM}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Palworld (Wine + UE4SS) Install Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

set -e

##############################################
# 1. SteamCMD Setup
##############################################
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

##############################################
# 2. Install Palworld (Windows build via SteamCMD)
##############################################
echo "Installing Palworld Windows dedicated server..."
./steamcmd.sh \
  +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
  +login anonymous \
  +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
  +app_update 2394010 validate \
  +quit

# Steam SDK libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so || true
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so || true

##############################################
# 3. Palworld Config
##############################################
echo "Setting up Palworld config..."
CONFIG_DIR="/mnt/server/Pal/Saved/Config/WindowsServer"
mkdir -p "${CONFIG_DIR}"

if [ -f "/mnt/server/Pal/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/PalWorldSettings.ini" ]; then
  echo "Config already exists, backing up..."
  mv "${CONFIG_DIR}/PalWorldSettings.ini" "${CONFIG_DIR}/PalWorldSettings_$(date +"%Y%m%d%H%M%S").ini"
fi

if [ -f "/mnt/server/DefaultPalWorldSettings.ini" ]; then
  cp /mnt/server/DefaultPalWorldSettings.ini "${CONFIG_DIR}/PalWorldSettings.ini"
  echo "Config copied."
else
  echo "DefaultPalWorldSettings.ini not found, skipping."
fi

##############################################
# 4. UE4SS Installation
##############################################
if [ "${INSTALL_UE4SS}" == "1" ]; then
  echo "Installing UE4SS..."
  UE4SS_DIR="/mnt/server/Pal/Binaries/Win64"
  mkdir -p "${UE4SS_DIR}"

  # Download latest UE4SS release
  UE4SS_URL=$(curl -sSL https://api.github.com/repos/UE4SS-RE/RE-UE4SS/releases/latest \
    | grep 'browser_download_url' \
    | grep 'UE4SS_v.*\.zip' \
    | grep -v 'zDEV\|CustomGameConfigs\|MapGenBP' \
    | head -1 \
    | cut -d'"' -f4)

  if [ -z "${UE4SS_URL}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not find UE4SS download URL!"
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Downloading UE4SS from: ${UE4SS_URL}"
  curl -sSL -o /tmp/ue4ss.zip "${UE4SS_URL}"
  mkdir -p /tmp/ue4ss_extract
  unzip -o /tmp/ue4ss.zip -d /tmp/ue4ss_extract

  # Copy required files
  cp /tmp/ue4ss_extract/dwmapi.dll "${UE4SS_DIR}/" 2>/dev/null || \
  cp /tmp/ue4ss_extract/*/dwmapi.dll "${UE4SS_DIR}/" 2>/dev/null || true

  cp /tmp/ue4ss_extract/UE4SS.dll "${UE4SS_DIR}/" 2>/dev/null || \
  cp /tmp/ue4ss_extract/*/UE4SS.dll "${UE4SS_DIR}/" 2>/dev/null || true

  cp /tmp/ue4ss_extract/UE4SS-settings.ini "${UE4SS_DIR}/" 2>/dev/null || \
  cp /tmp/ue4ss_extract/*/UE4SS-settings.ini "${UE4SS_DIR}/" 2>/dev/null || true

  # Patch settings for headless Wine server (no GUI!)
  if [ -f "${UE4SS_DIR}/UE4SS-settings.ini" ]; then
    sed -i 's/^GuiConsoleEnabled.*/GuiConsoleEnabled = 0/' "${UE4SS_DIR}/UE4SS-settings.ini"
    sed -i 's/^ConsoleEnabled.*/ConsoleEnabled = 0/' "${UE4SS_DIR}/UE4SS-settings.ini"
    sed -i 's/^LogToFile.*/LogToFile = 1/' "${UE4SS_DIR}/UE4SS-settings.ini"
    echo "UE4SS settings patched for headless/Wine operation."
  fi

  # Create Mods directory
  mkdir -p "${UE4SS_DIR}/ue4ss/Mods"
  echo "UE4SS installed successfully."
  ls -la "${UE4SS_DIR}/"
else
  echo "Skipping UE4SS installation (INSTALL_UE4SS != 1)."
fi

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: App ID
variables.description: Do not edit! Palworld Windows Server App ID.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name displayed in the server browser.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server. Leave empty for public.

variables.name: RCON Port
variables.description: RCON port (does not need to be allocated as a panel port).

variables.name: Allow Connect Platform
variables.description: Which platform players can connect from.

variables.name: Install UE4SS
variables.description: Set to 1 to automatically download and install UE4SS mod loader during installation. Required for mods/plugins.

variables.name: Server Description
variables.description: Short description shown in the server browser.

variables.name: Public IP
variables.description: Public IP shown to players. Leave empty to use allocation IP automatically.
